description.value: Aura moderate evocation; CL 8th; Slot none; Price 29,600 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION This staff is made from polished birch, inlaid with ivory, and topped with a pristine white gemstone. The staff allows use of the following spells: Align weapon (good only, 1 charge) Detect Evil (1 charge) Holy smite (2 charges) Magic circle against evil (2 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells align weapon, detect evil, holy smite, magic circle against evil; Cost 14,800 gp.
